base_directives: Lighting must ensure full facial clarity and micro-detail visibility

structure_blocks.MODEL_FEATURES: facial structure, skin micro-texture, gaze intensity, hairstyle, editorial pose
structure_blocks.CLOTHING_FEATURES: fabric density, laser-cut edges, stitching details, body-hugging anatomical design, tension and flow of material
structure_blocks.EDITORIAL_ENVIRONMENT: studio setup, volumetric fog, cinematic shadows, reflective surfaces, controlled lighting architecture
structure_blocks.TECHNICAL_TAGS: Phase One XF, 80mm lens, f/1.4, ISO 100, ultra realistic photography

imagePromptRules.quality_rule: The models' faces must not change or become distorted; facial structure must remain consistent across all angles. No anatomical distortion is allowed.

garmentRules.style_language: luxury fashion editorial catalog description style
